# hono-cf-access

> Access control middleware for [Hono](https://hono.dev/) leveraging Cloudflare Workers' `request.cf` properties. Provides country blocking, ASN blocking, and maintenance mode as composable middlewares with RFC 9457 Problem Details error responses and zero external dependencies (Hono peer dependency only).

The library exposes three middlewares — `countryBlock()`, `asnBlock()`, `maintenance()` — that can be chained on any Hono route. Each accepts declarative `deny` / `allow` lists (mutually exclusive) and a `fallback` option that controls behavior when `request.cf` is unavailable (e.g. local development). All middlewares populate a `cfInfo` context variable with normalized geo data accessible from downstream handlers.

Important scope boundary: this library performs **authorization based on Cloudflare-supplied geo/network data**. It does **not** verify Cloudflare Access JWTs or service tokens — pair with [`@hono/cloudflare-access`](https://github.com/honojs/middleware/tree/main/packages/cloudflare-access) if you need cryptographic identity verification.

## Documentation

- [README](https://github.com/paveg/hono-cf-access/blob/main/README.md): Full usage guide, API reference, security notes, and RFC 9457 error response catalog
- [Contributing guide](https://github.com/paveg/hono-cf-access/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): Development setup, build / test / lint commands, and PR conventions
- [Changelog](https://github.com/paveg/hono-cf-access/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): Release history maintained via Changesets

## Source

- [src/index.ts](https://github.com/paveg/hono-cf-access/blob/main/src/index.ts): Public exports
- [src/country-block.ts](https://github.com/paveg/hono-cf-access/blob/main/src/country-block.ts): `countryBlock()` middleware — ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code filtering
- [src/asn-block.ts](https://github.com/paveg/hono-cf-access/blob/main/src/asn-block.ts): `asnBlock()` middleware — ASN-based filtering
- [src/maintenance.ts](https://github.com/paveg/hono-cf-access/blob/main/src/maintenance.ts): `maintenance()` middleware with `allowedIps` bypass and dynamic toggle
- [src/ip.ts](https://github.com/paveg/hono-cf-access/blob/main/src/ip.ts): IPv4 / IPv6 address and CIDR matching, including IPv4-mapped IPv6 normalization
- [src/cf.ts](https://github.com/paveg/hono-cf-access/blob/main/src/cf.ts): `request.cf` extraction and `CfInfo` shape
- [src/errors.ts](https://github.com/paveg/hono-cf-access/blob/main/src/errors.ts): RFC 9457 `application/problem+json` response builders
- [src/types.ts](https://github.com/paveg/hono-cf-access/blob/main/src/types.ts): Public TypeScript types (`CfInfo`, options interfaces)

## Package

- [package.json](https://github.com/paveg/hono-cf-access/blob/main/package.json): npm metadata, scripts (`build`, `test`, `lint`, `typecheck`), peer dependency on `hono >= 4.0.0`
- [npm: hono-cf-access](https://www.npmjs.com/package/hono-cf-access): Published package

## Optional

- [LICENSE](https://github.com/paveg/hono-cf-access/blob/main/LICENSE): MIT
- [biome.json](https://github.com/paveg/hono-cf-access/blob/main/biome.json): Biome lint / format configuration
- [tsup.config.ts](https://github.com/paveg/hono-cf-access/blob/main/tsup.config.ts): Build configuration (dual ESM / CJS output)
- [vitest.config.ts](https://github.com/paveg/hono-cf-access/blob/main/vitest.config.ts): Test runner configuration
- [tests/](https://github.com/paveg/hono-cf-access/tree/main/tests): Vitest test suite covering middlewares, IP matching, and error responses
